findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "enrich_tech_risk" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash a38b6087)" → after: "Security enrichment: tech-stack fingerprint + CVE mapping + EPSS + CISA KEV + verdict (clear/review/block) for a domain. Cost: $0.05 USDC per call (x402 micropayment)."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
